title: Jackass Mail
writer: Lawrence Hazard, C. Gardner Sullivan, Lionel Houser
actors: Wallace Beery, Marjorie Main, J. Carrol Naish
plot: Tiny Tucker delivers mail and, attracted to her, Just Baggot becomes her new carrier. After he kills a man in a gunfight, the man's son joins him in the deliveries and they become good friends. But Baggot has two problems - alcoho...
